item.title: Enabling Low-Code Developers to Create Custom Client Reports with a Helping Hand from Azure – Norfolk Power Platform User Group
item.description: Enabling Low-Code Developers to Create Custom Client Reports with a Helping Hand from Azure – Norfolk Power Platform User Group 📅 Date: 22nd May 2025 📍 Location: Norwich Digital Hub 🍕 Pizza included! Session Overview At the Norfolk Power Platform User Group, I delivered a session titled: ✨ “Enabling low-code developers to create custom client reports with a helping hand from Azure” In this session, I explored: Using Power Automate to generate custom reports securely.
